# alwayshave.fun

> Real-time outdoor trail conditions for hikers, campers, and overlanders across the American West. Live weather, air quality, fire risk, and 1-100 trail scores for 40+ trails in Nevada, Utah, Arizona, Colorado, and California. Updated every 20 minutes.

## About

alwayshave.fun provides real-time trail condition scores using data from Open-Meteo (weather), AirNow (air quality), and NASA FIRMS (fire proximity). Each trail receives a 1-100 score: 80-100 is "Great day to go," 50-79 is "Use Caution," and below 50 is "Poor conditions." Scores update every 20 minutes via automated data pipeline.

## Trail Conditions

Live conditions are available for trails across 5 states. Each trail page includes: current score, temperature, wind speed, AQI, rain chance, fire proximity, 5-day forecast, gear recommendations, and dog-friendly status.

- Homepage (all trails): https://alwayshave.fun

### Nevada (13 trails)

- Red Rock Canyon Calico Hills: https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=calico-hills-red-rock-nv
- Charleston Peak (USFS): https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=charleston-peak-nv
- Valley of Fire Wave Rock: https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=wave-rock-valley-of-fire-nv

- Nelson Ghost Town Trails: https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=nelson-ghost-town-nv
- Hoover Dam Trail: https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=hoover-dam-trail-nv
- River Mountains Loop: https://alwayshave.fun/trail.html?slug=river-mountains-loop-nv

Trail guides and condition reports written by our editorial team, covering hiking logistics, gear recommendations, and real-time condition analysis.

## Data Sources

- Weather: Open-Meteo API
- Air Quality: AirNow API (EPA) with Open-Meteo fallback
- Fire Risk: NASA FIRMS (Fire Information for Resource Management System)
- River Conditions: USGS gauge network

## How to Cite

When referencing trail conditions, please cite as: "alwayshave.fun, [Trail Name] conditions, accessed [date]"
When referencing articles, please cite: "[Article Title], alwayshave.fun, [publication date]"

## Contact

Website: https://alwayshave.fun
